title: KV bindings
excerpt: description: KV bindings connect a Cloudflare Worker to a KV namespace for reading and writing data. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. KV [bindings](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/runtime-apis/bindings/) allow for communication between a Worker and a KV namespace. Configure KV bindings in the [Wrangler configuration file](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/configuration/).
